name: Neon Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (2-1/4 oz.) sliced ripe olives, drained
1/3 cup fresh basil leaves, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Combine vegetables, turkey, basil, and cheese in a large bowl.
3. Toss with 1/2 cup Italian dressing.
4. Chill at least 2 hours before serving.
5. If needed, add an additional 1/4 to 1/2 cup salad dressing before serving.
